extraction.one_line_summary: MARTIN Dan attacked inside final kilometer on Laguna Negra category 1 finish, taking 4 bonus seconds to close gap on ROGLIC Primoz to just 5 seconds overall
tactical_patterns: Movistar controlled valley section hunting crosswinds after first cat-3, not Jumbo-Visma, revealing offensive team ambitions beyond stage hunting
Roglic positioned unusually far back (not in first 10 riders) entering final climb, suggesting fatigue or tactical miscalculation after three brutal stages
Martin targeted bonus seconds sprint finish knowing summit finish bonuses provide GC opportunities when gaps are small after attritional opening stages

rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: negative: positioned uncharacteristically deep in peloton entering final climb, lost 4 seconds in bonus sprint, now only 5 seconds ahead after controlling race
rider_signals.MARTIN Dan: positive: carried Tour de France injury-induced form perfectly into Vuelta home roads, aggressive finish despite three-day accumulated fatigue suggests superior recovery
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: positive: moved into solo KOM lead and remains 13 seconds back, showing consistency across varied three-day terrain
rider_signals.CHAVES Esteban: negative: suffered bad luck allowing Mas to leapfrog him to fourth overall despite riding well previously
